headline: Dow Jones Futures: Nasdaq Eyes Key Levels Amid Iran News; Nvidia, Valero, Dell, SpaceX In Focus
summary: Tech futures rose overnight after Nvidia, Dell and other AI stocks bounced and SpaceX hit a new low. Oil prices kept rising on Iran news.

headline: US Stock Market Today: S&P 500 Futures Fall On Higher Yields And Inflation Jitters
summary: The Morning Bull - US Market Morning Update Thursday, Jul, 9 2026 US stock futures are pointing lower this morning, with E mini S&P 500 contracts down about 0.8%, as investors react to a mix of higher borrowing costs and fresh inflation worries. The US 10 year Treasury yield is sitting near 4.58%, a 4 week high, which means mortgages, car loans and business borrowing could stay expensive. At the same time, one year US inflation expectations are at 3.7%, and a drop in US oil inventories is...
